package.name: robot_safety
package.description:
Safety gating layer for the Go2 autonomy stack.
velocity_limiter node: Sits between Nav2 /cmd_vel and go2_hw_bridge. Publishes /cmd_vel_safe (zero) when: - robot_status.estop_active is true, or - No /cmd_vel received within cmd_timeout seconds (watchdog). Otherwise forwards /cmd_vel unchanged.
Enable via: ros2 launch go2_bringup go2_bringup.launch.py use_safety:=true
TODO(safety): Add tilt_monitor node (IMU-based fall/tilt detection → /estop).
